title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 311.730 - Fees paid into general revenue fund and division of alcohol and tobacco control fund
text:
311.730.  Fees paid into general revenue fund and division of alcohol and tobacco control fund. — 1.  Except as otherwise provided under subsection 2 of this section, all fees collected by the director of revenue as provided for in this chapter, including licenses, inspection and gauging fees, shall be paid into the state treasury, to the credit of the ordinary state revenue fund.
  2.  Seventy percent of all fees for licenses and permits collected under this chapter shall be paid to the credit of the division of alcohol and tobacco control fund established under section 311.735.
(RSMo 1939 § 4930, A.L. 1945 p. 1043, A.L. 2015 S.B. 373)
